metadata.title: Open vault in VSCode
metadata.description: Open vault in VSCode Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggle this OFF if you want to hide the Ribbon Icon.
ast.target: 如果您想隐藏功能区图标，请将此项关闭。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggle this OFF if you'd prefer that the Ribbon Icon opens VSCode via URL.
ast.target: 如果您更希望功能区图标通过 URL 打开 VSCode，请将此项关闭。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggle this OFF to hide the "Open in VS Code" option when right-clicking a file/folder.
ast.target: 将此项关闭以在右键单击文件/文件夹时隐藏“在 VS Code 中打开”选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Open the current file rather than the root of the vault.
ast.target: 打开当前文件而不是仓库根目录。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You can override the default vscode:// to VSCode Insiders, VSCodium or other VSCode variants' protocol string
ast.target: 您可以将默认的 vscode:// 替换为 VSCode Insiders、VSCodium 或其他 VSCode 变体的协议字符串。
